---
title: "Bibliografía"
title-block: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
body-classes: biblioteca-page
---

::: {.library-page}

::: {.library-section}
## Bibliografía obligatoria y básica

::: {.library-list .library-grid-2}

::: {.library-card .library-card-featured}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-required">Obligatoria</span>
<span class="library-tag library-tag-basic">Básica</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir PDF](resources/biblio/Agresti%20Franklin%20Klingenberg%202023%20-%20Statistics%20The%20Art%20and%20Science%20of%20Learning%20from%20Data,%205th%20Edition,%20Global%20Edition%20(Pearson).pdf){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[Descargar](resources/biblio/Agresti%20Franklin%20Klingenberg%202023%20-%20Statistics%20The%20Art%20and%20Science%20of%20Learning%20from%20Data,%205th%20Edition,%20Global%20Edition%20(Pearson).pdf){.library-btn download=""}
:::
:::

### Agresti, Franklin & Klingenberg (2023)

::: {.library-title}
*Statistics: The art and science of learning from data*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Agresti, A., Franklin, C., & Klingenberg, B. (2023). *Statistics: The art and science of learning from data* (5.ª ed.). Pearson.
:::

<details class="library-details">
<summary>Capítulos recomendados</summary>

- Cap. 1. Para clases 2 y 3.
- Cap. 2. Para clase 4.
- Cap. 3. Para clase 5.

</details>

:::

::: {.library-card .library-card-featured}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-required">Obligatoria</span>
<span class="library-tag library-tag-basic">Básica</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir PDF](resources/biblio/Field%202012%20-%20Discovering-Statistics-Using-R.pdf){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[Descargar](resources/biblio/Field%202012%20-%20Discovering-Statistics-Using-R.pdf){.library-btn download=""}
:::
:::

### Field, Miles & Field (2012)

::: {.library-title}
*Discovering statistics using R*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Field, A., Miles, J., & Field, Z. (2012). *Discovering statistics using R*. SAGE.
:::

::: {.library-note}
Texto de apoyo para el uso de R en análisis estadístico aplicado.
:::

:::

::: {.library-card .library-card-featured}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-required">Obligatoria</span>
<span class="library-tag library-tag-basic">Básica</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir PDF](resources/biblio/Johnson%20Kubi%202008%20-%20Estadistica%20elemental%20(10ed).pdf){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[Descargar](resources/biblio/Johnson%20Kubi%202008%20-%20Estadistica%20elemental%20(10ed).pdf){.library-btn download=""}
:::
:::

### Johnson & Kuby (2008)

::: {.library-title}
*Estadística elemental: Lo esencial*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Johnson, R., & Kuby, P. (2008). *Estadística elemental: Lo esencial* (10.ª ed.). Cengage Learning.
:::

<details class="library-details">
<summary>Capítulos recomendados</summary>

- Cap. 1. Para clase 2.
- Cap. 2. Para clase 4.
- Cap. 3. Para clase 5.

</details>

:::

::: {.library-card .library-card-featured}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-required">Obligatoria</span>
<span class="library-tag library-tag-basic">Básica</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir PDF](resources/biblio/Ritchey%202008%20-%20Estadistica_para_las_CCSS%20(2ed).pdf){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[Descargar](resources/biblio/Ritchey%202008%20-%20Estadistica_para_las_CCSS%20(2ed).pdf){.library-btn download=""}
:::
:::

### Ritchey (2008)

::: {.library-title}
*Estadística para las ciencias sociales: El potencial de la imaginación estadística*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Ritchey, F. (2008). *Estadística para las ciencias sociales: El potencial de la imaginación estadística* (2.ª ed.). McGraw-Hill.
:::

<details class="library-details">
<summary>Capítulos recomendados</summary>

- Cap. 1. Para clase 1.
- Cap. 2. Para clase 3.
- Caps. 3, 4 y 5. Para clase 4.

</details>

:::

::: {.library-card .library-card-featured}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-required">Obligatoria</span>
<span class="library-tag library-tag-basic">Básica</span>
<span class="library-tag library-tag-suggested">En línea</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir recurso](https://andrescruz.org/libroadp/index.html){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::
:::

### Urdinez & Cruz (2021)

::: {.library-title}
*Political Data Science Using R: A Practical Guide*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Urdinez, F., & Cruz, A. (Eds.). (2021). *Political Data Science Using R: A Practical Guide*. CRC Press.
:::

<details class="library-details">
<summary>Capítulos recomendados</summary>

- Cap. 1. Para clase 1.
- Cap. 2. Para clase 2.

</details>

:::

::: {.library-card .library-card-featured}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-required">Obligatoria</span>
<span class="library-tag library-tag-basic">Básica</span>
<span class="library-tag library-tag-suggested">En línea</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir recurso](https://es.r4ds.hadley.nz/){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::
:::

### Wickham & Grolemund (2023)

::: {.library-title}
*R para Ciencia de Datos*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Wickham, H., & Grolemund, G. (2023). *R para Ciencia de Datos*.
:::

<details class="library-details">
<summary>Secciones recomendadas</summary>

- Secciones 1, 2 y 4. Para clase 1.
- Secciones 5 y 6. Para clase 2.
- Sección 28. Para clase 4.

</details>

:::

:::
:::

::: {.library-section}
## Bibliografía complementaria y sugerida

::: {.library-list .library-grid-2}

::: {.library-card}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-complementary">Complementaria</span>
:::
:::

### Agresti (2018)

::: {.library-title}
*Statistical methods for the social sciences*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Agresti, A. (2018). *Statistical methods for the social sciences* (5.ª ed.). Pearson.
:::

::: {.library-note}
Referencia complementaria para profundizar en métodos estadísticos aplicados a ciencias sociales. No hay PDF local disponible para esta edición en `resources/biblio`.
:::

:::

::: {.library-card}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-complementary">Complementaria</span>
<span class="library-tag library-tag-suggested">En línea</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir recurso](https://bookdown.org/gboccardo/manual-ED-UCH/){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::
:::

### Boccardo & Ruiz (2019)

::: {.library-title}
*RStudio para Estadística Descriptiva en Ciencias Sociales*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Boccardo, G., & Ruiz, F. (2019). *RStudio para Estadística Descriptiva en Ciencias Sociales*.
:::

::: {.library-note}
Manual aplicado para trabajar estadística descriptiva en RStudio.
:::

:::

::: {.library-card}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-complementary">Complementaria</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir PDF](resources/biblio/Cea%202001%20-%20Metodologia_cuantitativa_estrategias_y_tecnicas_de_investigacion_social.pdf){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[Descargar](resources/biblio/Cea%202001%20-%20Metodologia_cuantitativa_estrategias_y_tecnicas_de_investigacion_social.pdf){.library-btn download=""}
:::
:::

### Cea D'Ancona (2010)

::: {.library-title}
*Metodología cuantitativa: Estrategias y técnicas de investigación social*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Cea D'Ancona, M. Á. (2010). *Metodología cuantitativa: Estrategias y técnicas de investigación social*. Síntesis.
:::

::: {.library-ref .library-ref-muted}
**Edición disponible:** Cea D'Ancona, M. Á. (2001). *Metodología cuantitativa*. Síntesis.
:::

:::

::: {.library-card}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-complementary">Complementaria</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir PDF](resources/biblio/Nussbaumer%202016%20-%20Storytelling%20with%20Data_%20A%20Data%20Visualization%20Guide%20for%20Business%20Professionals%20(John%20Wiley%20&%20Sons).pdf){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[Descargar](resources/biblio/Nussbaumer%202016%20-%20Storytelling%20with%20Data_%20A%20Data%20Visualization%20Guide%20for%20Business%20Professionals%20(John%20Wiley%20&%20Sons).pdf){.library-btn download=""}
:::
:::

### Nussbaumer (2015)

::: {.library-title}
*Storytelling with Data: A Data Visualization Guide for Business Professionals*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Nussbaumer, C. (2015). *Storytelling with Data: A Data Visualization Guide for Business Professionals*. John Wiley & Sons.
:::

::: {.library-note}
Apoyo para comunicación visual, diseño de gráficos y narrativas con datos.
:::

:::

::: {.library-card}

::: {.library-card-head}
::: {.library-tags}
<span class="library-tag library-tag-complementary">Complementaria</span>
:::

::: {.library-actions}
[Abrir PDF](resources/biblio/Schwabish%202017%20-%20Better%20presentations%20_%20a%20guide%20for%20scholars,%20researchers,%20and%20wonks%20(Columbia%20University%20Press).pdf){.library-btn .library-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[Descargar](resources/biblio/Schwabish%202017%20-%20Better%20presentations%20_%20a%20guide%20for%20scholars,%20researchers,%20and%20wonks%20(Columbia%20University%20Press).pdf){.library-btn download=""}
:::
:::

### Schwabish (2017)

::: {.library-title}
*Better presentations: A guide for scholars, researchers, and wonks*
:::

::: {.library-ref}
Schwabish, J. (2017). *Better presentations: A guide for scholars, researchers, and wonks*. Columbia University Press.
:::

::: {.library-note}
Recurso complementario para mejorar presentaciones y comunicación de resultados.
:::

:::

:::
:::

:::
